scripts.release:build: npm run build && cargo build --release --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --bin spielgantt && npm run tauri -- build --bundles app && npm run release:dmg && npm run release:verify
scripts.test:frontend: node --import tsx --test tests/native-window-bounds.test.ts tests/native-window-layout.test.ts tests/remembered-projects.test.ts tests/project-action-model.test.ts tests/project-session-owner.test.ts tests/sidebar-navigator-model.test.ts tests/workspace-selection-model.test.ts tests/frontend-smoke.test.ts tests/frontend-workflows.test.ts tests/sidebar-project-actions.test.ts tests/project-tree-interactions.test.ts tests/project-trash.test.ts tests/timeline.test.ts tests/react-root-mount.test.tsx tests/overlay-mutation-workflows.test.ts tests/task-dialogs.test.ts tests/task-inspector-react.test.tsx
